**示例 1:**

**输入：** nums = [1,1,2,2,1,1], queries = [[0,5,4],[0,3,3],[2,3,2]]

**输出：** [1,-1,2]

**解释：**

| 查询      | 子数组             | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |
| :-------- | :----------------- | :--- | :----------- | :--- |
| [0, 5, 4] | [1, 1, 2, 2, 1, 1] | 4    | 1 → 4, 2 → 2 | 1    |
| [0, 3, 3] | [1, 1, 2, 2]       | 3    | 1 → 2, 2 → 2 | -1   |
| [2, 3, 2] | [2, 2]             | 2    | 2 → 2        | 2    |

 

**示例 2:**

**输入：**nums = [3,2,3,2,3,2,3], queries = [[0,6,4],[1,5,2],[2,4,1],[3,3,1]]

**输出：**[3,2,3,2]

**解释：**

| 查询      | 子数组                | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |
| :-------- | :-------------------- | :--- | :----------- | :--- |

| [1, 5, 2] | [2, 3, 2, 3, 2]       | 2    | 2 → 3, 3 → 2 | 2    |
| [2, 4, 1] | [3, 2, 3]             | 1    | 3 → 2, 2 → 1 | 3    |
| [3, 3, 1] | [2]                   | 1    | 2 → 1        | 2    |

- `1 <= nums.length == n <= 104`

solve(nums, Queries) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(Q) ->
            [L, R, T] = Q,
            Subarray = lists:sublist(nums, L + 1, R - L + 1),

                        end,
                        Filtered

                    element(1, lists:hd(Sorted))
            end
        end,
        Queries

build_freq_map(List) ->

            case maps:find(X, Acc) of
                {ok, Count} -> maps:put(X, Count + 1, Acc);
                error -> maps:put(X, 1, Acc)
            end
        end,
        #{},
        List
    ).

```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/2]).

solve(Nums, Queries) ->
    lists:map(fun(Q) -> process_query(Nums, Q) end, Queries).

process_query(Nums, [Li, Ri, Threshold]) ->
    Subarray = lists:sublist(Nums, Li+1, Ri - Li + 1),
    FreqMap = count_freqs(Subarray),
    Candidates = get_candidates(FreqMap, Threshold),
    case Candidates of
        [] -> -1;
        _ -> get_answer(Candidates)
    end.

count_freqs(Subarray) ->
    maps:from_list(
        lists:foldl(
            fun(E, Acc) ->
                case maps:find(E, Acc) of
                    {ok, Count} -> maps:put(E, Count + 1, Acc);
                    error -> maps:put(E, 1, Acc)
                end
            end, maps:new(), Subarray)
    ).

get_candidates(FreqMap, Threshold) ->
    lists:filter(fun({E, F}) -> F >= Threshold end, maps:to_list(FreqMap)).

get_answer(Candidates) ->
    Sorted = lists:sort(
        fun(A, B) ->
            A_freq = element(2, A),
            B_freq = element(2, B),
            if
                A_freq > B_freq -> true;
                A_freq < B_freq -> false;
                true -> element(1, A) < element(1, B)
            end
        end, Candidates),
    element(1, hd(Sorted)).
```
